title: ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd:
ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure Consulting Pvt Ltd!
